title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 277.170 - Injunction powers of state veterinarian
text:
277.170.  Injunction powers of state veterinarian. — The state veterinarian may apply to the circuit courts and the circuit courts shall be authorized to issue orders enjoining any violation of this chapter.
(L. 1989 S.B. 300) 
Effective 5-04-89
